main.description: A cryptographically signed attestation that the account holder has passed IAL2 age verification. No PII is stored; only opaque hashes and provider metadata are recorded.

assertion.description: Age tier asserted by the verification provider.

provider.description: URL or DID of the IAL2 identity verification provider (e.g. https://id.me, did:web:clear.com, did:web:yoti.com).

credentialHash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of HMAC-SHA256(key=traiforce_salt, data=provider_subject_id). Anti-sybil: a single real-world identity maps to exactly one hash value, preventing one person from verifying multiple accounts.

expiresAt.description: UTC datetime after which this attestation is considered stale and re-verification is required.

adult18.description: Attests that the holder is at least 18 years of age.

adult21.description: Attests that the holder is at least 21 years of age.
